channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: WATCH: Mickey Mouse Club reboot
item.description: ABC News' Will Ganss shares the day's buzziest stories in "GMA" Pop News.

item.title: Strong earthquake hits Mexico-Guatemala border, tsunami alert lifted
item.description: The U.S. Geological Survey reported a magnitude 7.3 earthquake with an epicenter 30 miles southwest of Aquiles Serdan, Mexico.

item.title: This week on "Sunday Morning" (July 19)
item.description: A preview of the features for this week's broadcast of the Emmy-winning program, hosted by Jane Pauley.

item.title: "Worst case scenario" for shippers as U.S. and Iran step up attacks
item.description: As the U.S. and Iran escalate attacks 140 days into the war, an industry analyst says "nobody is willing to move" through the Strait of Hormuz.
